steps.t: Nardur-stazg lies to the north-west from Talan Gwilith. Raingon has asked you to burn the Orc-banner at Nardur-stazg and defeat the camp's champion. &…
Raingon is at Talan Gwilith, south-east of Nardur-stazg. You should return to Raingon with the tidings of your victory at Nardur-stazg. <rgb=#FF000…
